# Naiemul Hasan Naiem — SDET / Quality Engineer

> Portfolio: https://iamnaiem.me
> CV: https://iamnaiem.me/cv-naiemul-hasan-naiem.pdf

## Who

Naiemul Hasan Naiem (Naiem) is a Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET) and Quality Engineer at Tulip Tech, based in Dhaka, Bangladesh (UTC+6). CS Engineering graduate from AIUB (January 2024).

## Core expertise

- Test automation: Playwright + TypeScript (primary), Maestro (mobile YAML)
- Architecture: 4-Tier POM (locators / pages / utils / tests) — zero raw selectors in spec files
- API testing: Playwright request, Postman
- Mobile testing: Maestro YAML flows
- Test management: TestRail (Suite-based)
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Allure reporting
- AI-augmented workflow: test generation, failure triage, risk prediction

## Impact metrics

- 200+ critical defects caught pre-UAT
- 1,000+ test cases across 4 client platforms
- 95 Playwright specs authored
- 4 enterprise platforms delivered

## Projects delivered

- Workforce Management Platform (enterprise HR, UAT phase)
- Premium Wellness Booking App (React Native + NestJS + Stripe, London therapist platform)
- AI Agent Provisioning Platform
- FCA-Regulated Remittance App (UK fintech)
